CalculateGeometryAttributes ComprehensiveLandUse "Acreage AREA_GEODESIC" # "International Acres" PROJCS["NAD_1983_HARN_StatePlane_Washington_North_FIPS_4601_Feet",GEOGCS["GCS_North_American_1983_HARN",DATUM["D_North_American_1983_HARN",SPHEROID["GRS_1980",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Lambert_Conformal_Conic"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",1640416.666666667],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",-120.8333333333333],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",47.5],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_2",48.73333333333333],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",47.0],UNIT["Foot_US",0.3048006096012192]],VERTCS["NGVD_1929",VDATUM["National_Geodetic_Vertical_Datum_1929"],PARAMETER["Vertical_Shift",0.0],PARAMETER["Direction",1.0],UNIT["Foot_US",0.3048006096012192]] "Same as input"

CalculateField ComprehensiveLandUse RedComprehensiveLandUseID SequentialNumber() "Python 3" "# Calculates a sequential number # More calculator examples at esriurl.com/CalculatorExamples rec=0 def SequentialNumber(): global rec pStart = 1 pInterval = 1 if (rec == 0): rec = pStart else: rec = rec + pInterval return rec" Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.4000

descript.abstract: REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.
descript.purpose: REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.

citeinfo.origin: REQUIRED: The name of an organization or individual that developed the data set.
citeinfo.pubdate: REQUIRED: The date when the data set is published or otherwise made available for release.
citeinfo.title: RedmondGIS.DBO.ComprehensiveLanduse

timeperd.current: REQUIRED: The basis on which the time period of content information is determined.

sngdate.caldate: REQUIRED: The year (and optionally month, or month and day) for which the data set corresponds to the ground.

status.progress: REQUIRED: The state of the data set.
status.update: REQUIRED: The frequency with which changes and additions are made to the data set after the initial data set is completed.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.
theme.themekey: REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.

idinfo.accconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.
idinfo.useconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows Server 2016 Technical Preview Version 10.0 (Build 20348) ; Esri ArcGIS 13.3.0.51575

Consts.useLimit:
While the data have been tested for accuracy and are properly functioning, the City of Redmond disclaims any responsibility for the accuracy or correctness of the data.

The foregoing warranty is exclusive and in lieu of all other warranties of merchantability, fitness for particular purpose and/or any other type whether expressed or implied.

In no event shall the City of Redmond become liable to users of these data, or any other party, for any loss or damages, consequential or otherwise, including but not limited to time, money, or goodwill, arising from the use, operation or modification of the data. In using these data, users further agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless City of Redmond for any and all liability of any nature arising out of or resulting from the lack of accuracy or correctness of the data, or the use of the data.

Please acknowledge the City of Redmond as a source when City of Redmond data are used in the preparation of reports, papers, publications, maps, and other products.

To ensure that appropriate documentation and data limitations are provided, these databases should not be redistributed to any other parties.

dataIdInfo.idPurp: The Comprehensive Land Use layer reflect the land use goals of the City of Redmond's Comprehensive Plan. These land use designations may be revised annually by Comprehensive map amendments and occasionally other planning ordinances. The Comprehensive Land Use (CLU)categories are officially designated by the City of Redmond's Comprehensive Plan and are required by City of Redmond ordinance to be mapped.
dataIdInfo.idAbs:
A comprehensive plan articulates a series of goals, objectives, policies, actions, and standards that are intended to guide the day-to-day decisions of elected officials and local government staff. A comprehensive plan is adopted pursuant to the Washington State Growth Management Act.

The CLU designations are defined in the City or Redmond's Comprehensive Plan in order to implement the plan's land use policies. CLU designation boundaries are tied to cadastral features. When cadastral features are adjusted to improve positional accuracy the CLU boundaries must also be adjusted.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntper: REQUIRED: The person responsible for the metadata information.
cntorgp.cntorg: REQUIRED: The organization responsible for the metadata information.

cntaddr.addrtype: REQUIRED: The mailing and/or physical address for the organization or individual.
cntaddr.city: REQUIRED: The city of the address.
cntaddr.state: REQUIRED: The state or province of the address.
cntaddr.postal: REQUIRED: The ZIP or other postal code of the address.

cntinfo.cntvoice: REQUIRED: The telephone number by which individuals can speak to the organization or individual.

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: A piece of legislation enacted by a municipal authority.
ArcGIS Editor Tracking field. System-generated username of who created the feature
ArcGIS Editor Tracking field. System-generated username of who most recently modified the feature.
